chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. Misc. A. No. 766 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1.For hearing of main case 2.For hearing of MA No.12116/25 09.09.2025 ---------- None present for applicant. No intimation is received. It appears from perusal of record that this matter pertains to dishonor of two cheques issued by proposed accused but no case is made out for any defect in the impugned order passed by Ex-Officio Justice of Peace. Dismissed for the above reason. J U D G E Ashraf
